More readability polish for bright accents.

### Fixed
- **Rating stars** and the **now-playing list** text now follow the auto-contrast rule too — they stay readable on a bright accent selection (both kept a fixed light colour before).
- The seek **waveform** now uses the exact accent colour instead of a lightened shade, so it matches the colour you picked.

### Update
Download `Flat Monkey Dark.mmip` below → MediaMonkey **Tools > Add-ons > Add…** → re-select **Flat Monkey Dark** under Options > Skin.
